title: Sonnet 5 vs Opus 4.8 — ultrathink (max effort)
effort: max (identical 'ultrathink' max-rigor directive prepended to both arms)
pricing_note: Sonnet 5 standard $3/$15, intro $2/$10 through 2026-08-31; Opus 4.8 $5/$25 per MTok. Costs normalized to official published rates.
headline: Max effort raised recall for ~1.7x the cost, but the gate verdicts never changed and Opus still missed Sonnet's stateful-regex bug — a model-characteristic blind spot effort didn't fix.
